title: Validate Stack Sequences
hints: Simulate the process step by step, using an actual stack to mimic the operations as they happen.
Iterate through the pushed array, adding each element to the stack. After each push, check if the stack top matches the current expected value in popped.
If the stack top matches the current popped value, pop it and move to the next element in popped. Return true if the stack is empty at the end.
